description: Configures Entra ID tenant-wide password protection: smart lockout thresholds, password expiration, custom banned password lists, and password history. Unlike Okta which supports per-group policies, Entra ID uses a single tenant-wide policy.

risk_profile_effects.standard: 12-char minimum guidance, 90-day expiration, 10 lockout attempts, 60s lockout, banned list enabled.
risk_profile_effects.elevated: 14-char minimum guidance, 60-day expiration, 5 lockout attempts, 120s lockout, banned list enabled.
risk_profile_effects.strict: 16-char minimum guidance, no expiration (NIST 800-63B compliant), 3 lockout attempts, 300s lockout, banned list enabled.

risk_profile.label: Risk Profile
risk_profile.client_description: Your security tier. Controls password complexity, expiration, and lockout defaults.

password_min_length.label: Minimum Password Length
password_min_length.client_description: Recommended minimum password length. Entra ID enforces an 8-character minimum natively; this sets the organizational standard enforced through user guidance and Conditional Access. Leave blank to use your risk profile default.

password_max_age_days.label: Password Expiration (days)
password_max_age_days.client_description: Maximum password age in days before users must change it. Set to 0 to disable expiration (recommended by NIST 800-63B for strict profiles with strong MFA). Leave blank to use your risk profile default.

password_history_count.label: Password History Count
password_history_count.client_description: Number of previous passwords a user cannot reuse. Entra ID supports up to 24. Leave blank to use your risk profile default.

password_lockout_attempts.label: Smart Lockout Threshold
password_lockout_attempts.client_description: Number of failed sign-in attempts before Entra ID smart lockout activates. Smart lockout is adaptive — it learns legitimate vs. attack patterns. Leave blank to use your risk profile default.

password_lockout_duration_seconds.label: Smart Lockout Duration (seconds)
password_lockout_duration_seconds.client_description: How long an account stays locked after exceeding the lockout threshold. Entra ID smart lockout automatically increases duration for repeat offenders. Leave blank to use your risk profile default.

enable_banned_password_list.label: Enable Custom Banned Password List
enable_banned_password_list.client_description: Enable Azure AD Password Protection custom banned list. Supplements Microsoft's global banned password list with organization-specific terms (company name, product names, etc.).

banned_passwords.label: Custom Banned Passwords
banned_passwords.client_description: Organization-specific banned password terms. Include your company name, product names, office locations, and other terms attackers might guess. Up to 1000 entries.

outputs.effective_password_min_length: Resolved minimum password length for the selected risk profile
outputs.effective_password_max_age_days: Resolved password expiration in days (0 = no expiration)
outputs.effective_lockout_duration_seconds: Resolved smart lockout duration in seconds
outputs.banned_password_list_enabled: Whether the custom banned password list is enabled
